title: Action not pinned to SHA
description: Using `trivy-action@v1` exposes you to tag hijacking attacks. Pin to a full commit SHA.

title: Untrusted shared runner
description: The pipeline uses the default shared runner, which may expose build artifacts to other tenants. Consider using a dedicated runner.

title: Image pulled from untrusted registry
description: The image `mycustom-registry.com/base:latest` is not from a trusted source. Use an internal mirror or pin to a specific digest.

title: Secret printed in build log
description: A command echoes an environment variable that contains a secret. This will leak credentials to the log.

title: Artifact uploaded without expiration
description: Build artifacts are kept forever, increasing the risk of data leakage. Set an `expire_in` value.
